# Left2Serve
> Left2Serve connects surplus food donors with NGOs, shelters, and volunteers to reduce food waste and feed communities.

## Features

- [Browse Food](/browse): Browse surplus food listings by category.
- [Impact](/impact): View community impact.
- [Community](/forum): Community forum to connect and share tips.
- [Dashboard](/dashboard): Real-time notifications for reservations and collections.

## About

Users can register as Donors (who post food), NGOs, or Volunteers (who claim and collect food). This site is AI-agent friendly and fully browsable.
